description: Population of beings needing Tara's swift protection and compassionate action

targets.name: Those Facing Immediate Danger
targets.description: All beings currently in life-threatening situations - accidents, violence, natural disasters in progress
targets.intention: May Green Tara's swift protection surround all beings in immediate danger, may they be rescued and delivered to safety

additional_data.quality: swift protection from the eight great fears

targets.name: Crisis Situations - Natural Disasters
targets.description: Those affected by earthquakes, floods, hurricanes, wildfires, tsunamis, and other natural disasters
targets.intention: May all beings in disaster zones receive Tara's protection, may rescue come swiftly, may their suffering be alleviated

additional_data.affected_annually: 100+ million people affected by natural disasters annually

targets.name: Crisis Situations - Conflict Zones
targets.description: Civilians caught in active armed conflict, war zones, and political violence
targets.intention: May all beings in conflict zones find safety, may violence cease, may peace prevail

additional_data.current_conflicts: Active conflicts in multiple regions globally

targets.name: Refugees and Displaced Persons
targets.description: Those forced to flee their homes - refugees, internally displaced persons, asylum seekers
targets.intention: May all refugees find safe haven, may they be welcomed with compassion, may they find new homes free from fear

targets.name: Women in Vulnerable Situations
targets.description: Women facing violence, trafficking, exploitation, and gender-based harm worldwide
targets.intention: May Tara's motherly protection shield all women, may they be empowered, may their dignity be honored

additional_data.estimated_count: 1 in 3 women experience gender-based violence globally

targets.name: Children in Vulnerable Situations
targets.description: Children at risk - orphans, child laborers, child soldiers, abused children, those without protection
targets.intention: May Tara's protective embrace surround all vulnerable children, may they be safe, nourished, and loved

additional_data.estimated_count: Over 1 billion children worldwide in vulnerability

targets.name: Animals in Shelters and Factory Farms
targets.description: Animals awaiting adoption in shelters and those in factory farm conditions
targets.intention: May all confined animals know Tara's compassion, may they find freedom from suffering and kind treatment

additional_data.estimated_count: 6.3 million in US shelters, 80+ billion in factory farms globally

targets.name: Victims of the Eight Great Fears
targets.description: Those beset by the eight traditional fears: lions (pride), elephants (ignorance), fire (anger), snakes (jealousy), thieves (wrong views), prisons (greed), floods (lust/desire), demons (doubt)
targets.intention: May Tara liberate all beings from outer and inner fears, may they attain fearlessness and awakening
